content:
Neptune in Scorpio: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Neptune in Scorpio blends the archetypal drive of Neptune (where you dream, dissolve boundaries, and seek the transcendent) with the Water, fixed nature of Scorpio.

  • Planet: Neptune — dreams, imagination, spirituality, illusion, compassion
  • Sign: Scorpio (Water/Fixed) — intensity, transformation, depth, passion, power

Eastern Perspective
